tasks.subject: Task 0: Cleanup baseline
tasks.description:
gitignore .agents/.claude/.impeccable; commit DESIGN.md/PRODUCT.md/README.

```json:metadata
{"files":[".gitignore","DESIGN.md","PRODUCT.md","README.md"],"verifyCommand":"git status --porcelain | grep -E '\\.agents|\\.claude|\\.impeccable'","acceptanceCriteria":["skill dirs gitignored","docs committed","no $HOME paths"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Nuke old frontend + fresh scaffold + embed
tasks.description:
Delete Nuxt UI dashboard/; scaffold Vite+Vue3+TS+Tailwind v4+shadcn-vue (alias fence); build→dist; one commit so go build never breaks.

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/package.json","dashboard/vite.config.ts","dashboard/components.json","dashboard/src/main.ts","dashboard/src/App.vue","pkg/webui/dist"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npm run build && cd .. && mise exec -- go build ./...","acceptanceCriteria":["no @nuxt/ui","build→dist","aliases.ui!=components","go build exit 0"]}
```
